Name: sapdme_shift
Title: Shift
ShortText: Maintain shifts for a given plant
Description: Shift is used to define the characteristics of your shift such as its beginning and end, clock-in and clock-out intervals, breaks. This API can be used to create, change, delete, and search for shifts and custom field definitions for it.
